name: enemy-archetype

---
# Enemy Archetype

## When to Use
- Adding a new enemy type.
- Refactoring enemy behavior and stats.
- Balancing enemy roles for wave composition.

## Procedure
1. Define archetype role and behavior contract.
2. Create data definition and stat profile.
3. Implement prefab and anchor/collider setup.
4. Integrate drop table and reward hooks.
5. Validate in wave scenarios.

## References
- [Enemy archetype template](./assets/enemy-archetype-template.md)
- [Enemy QA checklist](./assets/enemy-qa-checklist.md)
